name: VENGEANCE: Betrayed by the Hero's Party
description:
You'd heard stories of heroes coming from another world. All powerful beings who could single handedly save nations and alter the course of the future. The were supposed to be paragon of virtue, loved by all and loving them in return. You could never imagine them acting like Erik.

Erik may have been a powerful warrior, a bold leader and a handsome celebrity, but he was also a ruthless and ambitious man who would stop at nothing to get what he wanted. You joined his party to help save the realm, yet you witnessed the price of unchecked power. A man with an ego, a harem and a dream of ruling the world. Erik had your party wrapped around his finger, and he wanted you gone and out of the way

The otherworldly hero. The warrior princess. The hidden dagger. The devout priestess. The ambitious mage. It was only a matter of time before you were tossed aside. And what better opportunity than the moment you defeat the demon king?

The hero from another world has become the threat he swore to destroy. He is now on a warpath to conquer the world. So, what are you going to do about it?

New record for largest bot I've ever made. Holy shit.

Emlay

TiaDianeFerie
creator: NightHawk72j
